trivia_bullets.text: Keys to the House is an uncommon artifact from Duskmourn: House of Horror (DSK), released September 27, 2024. The Room mechanic -- an enchantment subtype introduced in DSK -- represents exploring and unlocking the shifting rooms of the House; Keys to the House is one of the few non-Room cards directly engaging that system.

The second ability ({3}, {T}, Sacrifice: lock or unlock a door of a target Room you control) interacts with the Room mechanic's lock/unlock system without paying a door's mana cost, making it a mana-efficient way to access the second half of a Room card.

Flavor text: "If you find them, they wanted to be found." -- no speaker named. Resonates with Duskmourn lore: Valgavoth's will extends throughout the mansion, and the House actively lures survivors to their doom.

The first ability is a one-mana basic land tutor ({1}, {T}, Sacrifice), unusual cost efficiency for non-green colors. EDHREC rank 10,741 makes it the most-played of the five cards in this batch among Commander players.
